meta_description: I’ve heard from people across the Borders who have told me that the price of
headings: h2: I’ve heard from people across the Borders who have told me that the price of heating oil has doubled in recent days.
h2: This is a deeply worrying time for many local people.
h2: I want to hear your views and experiences. Please fill in my survey below so I can explain the challenges facing local people to the UK Government.
h2: Heating Oil: I want to know your views
h3: John Lamont MP for the Borders
text_excerpt: Heating oil: I want to know your views | John Lamont Skip to main content John Lamont MP for the Borders Main navigation About News Campaigns Contact E-newsletter sign up Boost the Borders Heating Oil Survey John Lamont MP for the Borders Heating oil: I want to know your views Tweet I’ve heard from people across the Borders who have told me that the price of heating oil has doubled in recent days. This is a deeply worrying time for many local people. I want to hear your views and experiences. Please fill in my survey below so I can explain the challenges facing local people to the UK Government. Yes No Not sure Do you think adequate support is being provided by the UK Government and Scottish Government to support people with price increases? Yes No Not sure Do you think new regulations should be introduced to prevent companies from profiteering as a result of the war in the Middle East?
